parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'hubspot_owner_id', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.ownerId }, { propertyName: 'pipeline', operator: 'EQ', value: '1079008463' }, { propertyName: 'hs_is_closed_lost', operator: 'EQ', value: 'false' }, { propertyName: 'hs_is_closed_won', operator: 'EQ', value: 'false' }] }], properties: ['dealstage','notes_last_contacted','dealname','createdate'], limit: 200 }) }}
